items.title: China braced for second typhoon in a week as Bavi approaches landfall
items.dek: Hundreds of thousands of people are evacuated from eastern Zhejiang province, with the city of Wenzhou close to the path of the storm.
items.body: Hundreds of thousands of people are evacuated from eastern Zhejiang province, with the city of Wenzhou close to the path of the storm.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tourist speedboat capsizes in Vietnam, killing 15
items.dek: Local media say 21 people were saved after the boat overturned in rough seas near an island in south Vietnam.
items.body: Local media say 21 people were saved after the boat overturned in rough seas near an island in south Vietnam.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'We escaped Spanish wildfire, but our friends lost their lives'
items.dek: Hundreds of firefighters in Spain have been battling a deadly wildfire in the south of the country.
items.body: Hundreds of firefighters in Spain have been battling a deadly wildfire in the south of the country.
items.author: IriLine Desk
